 ## Metrics Tracking
-- Week 11: 138 subs ($27,303 cash).
-- MRR: ~$4,900.
-- Weekly Burn: ~$5.4k. Net burn: ~$4.3k.
-- Runway: ~6 weeks (post-Tier-3 change).
+- Week 12: 141 subs ($22,358 cash).
+- MRR: ~$5,000.
+- Weekly Net Burn: ~$4.3k (with $200 Ops).
+- Runway: ~5 weeks.
 
 ## Knowledge & Lessons
-- Plan C at Tier 5 was losing money per sub due to high usage.
-- Support responsiveness is a major churn risk and reputation killer.
-- Competitor quality is rising fast; need to stabilize cash before investing more in Dev/R&D.
+- Support issues are the main driver of negative sentiment.
+- S1 and S3 are price-happy but quality-sensitive on uptime/support.
+- RivalTech and ApexSaaS are improving quality (+0.10).
 
 ## To Do

-- Clear support backlog completely.
-- If cash hits $10k, cut ad spend and dev spend to survive.
